perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a grey cap and glasses (Tim) is walking on an outdoor city sidewalk, stopping to talk to someone off-camera. (2) He turns to the camera, speaking with expressive facial movements and hand gestures. (3) The scene transitions to the interior of a mobile phone retail store (Miko) where Tim displays different iPhone 16 retail boxes. (4) Close-up shots focus on the product boxes and overlayed price information. (5) He moves to a glass display cabinet to show a used iPhone 14. (6) He finishes by speaking directly to the camera with an emphatic expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice (Tim) is heard speaking loudly over ambient city street noise and traffic. (2) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music enters as he moves into the store. (3) Tim's voice remains the dominant feature, detailing product prices and specifications. (4) High-pitched 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects are used as text overlays appear on screen. (5) The music and vocals continue at a high energy level until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: '老闆 等一下等一下!' (Wait a minute, Boss!) and '想怎樣?' (What do you want?). (2) Hook text: '我要趁這波 買起來' (I want to buy in this wave) and '賺差價' (Make a profit on the difference). (3) Functional text: Lists 'iPhone16 Pro', 'iPhone16 Pro Max', 'iPhone16', and 'iPhone16e' with their respective storage sizes and prices in TWD. (4) Functional text: Details for a second-hand 'iPhone14 128G' including health percentage and price. (5) Decorative text: '再次打擊你' (Strike you again) with a humorous tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro outdoor conversation -> Indoor product price showcase -> Closing remarks

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim) visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey patterned flat cap, and a grey polo shirt with red/blue stripes on the sleeves.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts with a busy city sidewalk with trees and signage, transitions to a bright, well-lit electronics store with shelves of mobile accessories and phone display boxes.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight outdoors and bright, even fluorescent studio-style lighting indoors.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Location Shift -> Evidence/Showcase -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the Miko mobile store by demonstrating that they have the new iPhone 16 series in stock at stable prices, while also highlighting the availability of used phones to discourage scalping or buying at high margins.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically mentions the store name 'Miko', shows their storefront/interior, and lists their current inventory prices.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Creator's catchphrase and the '3c有意思tim哥' watermark and social media handles.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a variety-show style with heavy text overlays and sound effects to maintain high engagement in a short format.
